title: Technical Excellence Colleges: launch of Wave 2
body: "This guidance covers policy information for applicants of Wave 2 TECs, including:    TEC objectives and outputs alignment with the Industrial Strategy priority city regions and clusters the ‘hub and spoke’ delivery model with example activities funding the selection process for Wave 2 TECs  involvement of strategic authorities ways of working for TECs    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education courses and qualifications
